title: Omega Mag-Bind® Total RNA Isolation
author: Opentrons
description:
Links:

[RNA Isolation](./979d28)

[Normalization](./979d28-normalization)

[qPCR Prep](./979d28-pcr) This protocol performs the [Omega Mag-Bind® Total RNA 96 Kit](https://www.omegabiotek.com/product/total-cellular-rna-mag-bind-total-rna-96//?utm_source=google&utm_medium=ppc&utm_campaign=128157293756&utm_term=total%20rna%20extraction%20kit&utm_content=b&gclid=Cj0KCQjw-daUBhCIARIsALbkjSb5Gx-Bz7K1R_Dw_ePhpzhX8NNtwe_9GP1LXR7SfOaeOHWgEnehFE4aAtRVEALw_wcB) protocol. Samples should be loaded on the magnetic module in a NEST deepwell plate. For reagent layout in the 2 12-channel reservoirs used in this protocol, please see "Setup" below. There are several user-intervention steps to move the deepwell isolation plate to and from the Magnetic Module and QInstruments Bioshake. ---

Samples should be loaded on the magnetic module in a NEST deepwell plate. For reagent layout in the 2 12-channel reservoirs used in this protocol, please see "Setup" below. There are several user-intervention steps to move the deepwell isolation plate to and from the Magnetic Module and QInstruments Bioshake. ---
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.
Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.
Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
materials_raw: NEST 96 Well Plate 100 µL PCR Full Skirt
VWR® PCR Plates, 96-Well 200ul #83007-374 seated in Opentrons 96-well aluminum block
